mixStrategy: Reggae mix: drums and bass upfront, organ skank on offbeats for rhythmic drive, nylon guitar melody floats on top. Bass heavy in low-end, organ mid-range, guitar mid-high. Kick on beat 3 for one-drop feel, rim on 2 and 4, hi-hat steady 8ths. All tracks follow I(D)-IV(G)-V(A)-I(D) progression over 4-bar cycles.

tracks.name: Organ Offbeat Skank
tracks.frequencyRole: mid (C4-C6 range, ~260-1047 Hz, offbeat stabs only)

tracks.name: Drums One-Drop
tracks.frequencyRole: full spectrum (kick low, rim mid-high, hi-hat high)
